issues.title: Enemy dealt 27 dmg (51% of 53 HP) on floor 1
issues.description: On floor 1, encounter 1, turn 21 (seq 138), the enemy dealt 27 damage which is 51% of the player's 53 HP before the hit. This exceeds the 50% threshold for a single enemy turn.
issues.suggestedFix: Cap single-hit enemy damage to 50% of player current HP or add damage-reduction mechanics.

issues.title: Enemy dealt 38 dmg (100% of 38 HP) on floor 1
issues.description: On floor 1, encounter 1, turn 24 (seq 150), the enemy dealt 38 damage which is 100% of the player's 38 HP before the hit. This exceeds the 50% threshold for a single enemy turn.
issues.suggestedFix: Cap single-hit enemy damage to 50% of player current HP or add damage-reduction mechanics.

issues.title: Player defeated on floor 1, encounter 1 (crystal_golem)
issues.description: Player was defeated on floor 1, encounter 1 against crystal_golem (common). Accuracy was 32% with 24 turns played. Early defeat suggests difficulty may be too high for this profile.
issues.suggestedFix: Reduce early floor enemy HP/damage or activate canary system earlier for struggling profiles.

issues.title: HP crashed from 100 to 0 in floor 1 encounter 1
issues.description: During floor 1, encounter 1, player HP dropped from 100 to 0. Going from >70 to <20 in one encounter feels punishing and unfun.

issues.title: Card type "wild" was never played during the entire run
issues.description: The card type "wild" had 0 plays across the entire run (101 total cards played). This may indicate the type is not appearing in decks, not being offered, or players are avoiding it.
reproductionSteps: Check deck composition — does "wild" appear in the card pool?
